/**
 * src/components/ui/Badge.js
 * ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 * Reusable status badge component.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   <Badge status="registered" />   → green "Registered"
 *   <Badge status="stolen" />       → red "Stolen"
 *   <Badge status="pending" />      → amber "Pending"
 *
 * The component automatically looks up the right class and label
 * from the getStatusConfig helper.
 */import React from'react';import{getStatusConfig}from'../../utils/helpers';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Badge(_ref){let{status}=_ref;const{className,label}=getStatusConfig(status);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`badge ${className}`,children:label});}
